body.description: The column mapping and file reference for the import

hash.description: The unique file reference returned by the preimport endpoint.

import_type.description: The source format of the import.

skip_header.description: When true, the first row of the CSV is treated as a header row and skipped during import.

column_map.description: An object keyed by entity type. Each entity contains a mapping of CSV column indices to system fields.

mapping.description: Maps CSV column indices (as string keys) to system field names from the `available` array. Use an empty string to skip a column.
